assets.prompt:
Master sheet showing three stages of Haw: early (worried, slippers, hunched), middle (determined, barefoot or one shoe on, chalk in hand), and late (joyous, running shoes on, leaping). Neutral background with subtle maze wall sketch. Line weight: moderate, varying to show emotional state—thinner, tentative lines for fearful early panels, bolder and more confident lines later. The running shoes around the neck are always detailed, with laces trailing. Chalk or marker in hand adds a dynamic element; when writing, a glowing effect on the wall. Spiky hair with energetic strokes, becoming more tousled and dynamic as he progresses. Facial features shift from withdrawn to open: eyes wider, smile lines appearing. Backpack satchel for cheese samples is shown open late. Angle: front. Front-facing full-body model sheet, T-pose-friendly, neutral expression, feet-to-head visible, transparent or plain white background. Color story: Earth tones: tunic brown (30% screentone with crosshatching for texture), pants tan (15% screentone). Skin light tan left mostly white with subtle shading at edges. Running shoes red spot color, matching Scurry's to symbolize action; initially duller, later bright. Chalk is white, glowing in dark maze scenes. Early panels: muted, lower ink density, with grey undertones. Later panels: darker, more defined lines; a golden glow around him when joyful may be used sparingly as spot color to symbolize the cheese's warmth. The red shoes become a beacon. Lighting: Early: dim, side lighting from a single source creating deep shadows on face, emphasizing fear and isolation. Middle: key light from above and slightly behind, casting a light on the path ahead, shadows falling behind him, suggesting he is moving toward the light. Late: bright, diffused lighting from the new Cheese Station, filling his face with warm light, no harsh shadows, a gentle rim light from the cheese glow. Lens: Variable focal lengths. Early close-ups: 85mm-equivalent shallow DoF to isolate his fearful eyes and the slippers. Action shots: 35mm for full body in motion. Late wide shots: 24mm to capture the vast maze and his small but determined figure, then jumping. Framing rules: close-up on chalk writing on wall, medium shot for posture change, and a low-angle heroic shot for his joyful leap. World context: Two interconnected settings form the story world. The primary setting is the Maze: a vast, labyrinthine environment of dark corridors, blind alleys, and hidden chambers where glowing Cheese Stations offer abundance. The Maze is inhabited by two Mice (Sniff and Scurry) and two Littlepeople (Hem and Haw), whose search for cheese mirrors the human experience of desire and change. The secondary setting is a modern reunion hall in Chicago, where former classmates gather and Michael narrates the parable; this warm, mundane space serves as a frame for reflection and application. The manga cuts between the Maze and the reunion hall to draw parallels between the parable's lessons and real-life change.. Style: Clean lineart manga with a contrast between the dark, mysterious Maze (deep shadows, crosshatching, torchlight, glowing cheese) and the well-lit reunion hall (soft natural light, simple backgrounds). Mice are drawn in a cute, rounded animal style with exaggerated features; Littlepeople are small humanoids with expressive, human-like faces and body language; the frame human (Michael) is realistically proportioned. The cheese is always radiant and appetizing, appearing as wedges of various types.. Character identity (must be honoured): Haw (The Adaptive Learner (Protagonist)). Visual lock: A lean Littleperson with a piece of chalk or marker and running shoes tied around the neck; his expression shifts from worried to determined to joyous.. Silhouette: Upright posture, often reaching forward with one hand. Running shoes visible around neck. Backpack adds bulk. In later stages, leaping pose.. Costume: Simple earth-toned tunic and pants, initially with slippers (only early), later barefoot or in running shoes. A small satchel with a piece of chalk. A backpack for carrying cheese samples.. Hair/face: Spiky, slightly tousled brown hair; expressive, wide eyes (fearful at start, bright later); a nose and mouth that visibly shift from worry to laughter; light tan skin..

A front-facing, slightly downward-angled view of Hem standing in a deeply slouched posture. The plush robe is voluminous with soft, rounded folds, drawn with thick, soft outlines to emphasize bulk. The fuzzy slippers are large and prominent, with droopy bunny ears and pompoms, rendered with detailed texture. Background plain grid or empty. Line weight: thick, soft for robe, thinner for facial features to convey fragility. Crosshatching on robe for fabric texture. A shadow under the chin from hunching. Arms always crossed or clutching the robe. Thinning hair drawn with wispy, sparse lines. Facial features small and pinched: downturned mouth, small worried eyes with heavy eyelids. Angle: front. Front-facing full-body model sheet, T-pose-friendly, neutral expression, feet-to-head visible, transparent or plain white background. Color story: Pale blue robe rendered with a very light 5-10% dot screentone, almost white, to suggest softness. Highlights left white where fabric bunches. Slippers are medium grey 30% tone, with bunny ears shaded darker. Pale skin left white with fine lines for wrinkles. Spot color: pale blue used sparingly in close-ups as a motif for denial and comfort, but mostly black and white. Ink density is kept light and muted overall to reflect Hem's passive, fading energy. Lighting: Flat, even lighting from front, no dramatic shadows, giving a dull, dreary look. Slight shadow under the robe's collar and chin to emphasize the closed-off, hunched posture. No highlights except on the slippers to make them stand out as symbols of complacency. Background dim and static. Lens: 35mm-equivalent, medium depth-of-field. Framing: medium close-up to show facial expression and crossed arms; full-body shot to emphasize the slippers and robe bulk. Slight high angle to make him look smaller and more pitiful, reinforcing his resistance. World context: Two interconnected settings form the story world. The primary setting is the Maze: a vast, labyrinthine environment of dark corridors, blind alleys, and hidden chambers where glowing Cheese Stations offer abundance. The Maze is inhabited by two Mice (Sniff and Scurry) and two Littlepeople (Hem and Haw), whose search for cheese mirrors the human experience of desire and change. The secondary setting is a modern reunion hall in Chicago, where former classmates gather and Michael narrates the parable; this warm, mundane space serves as a frame for reflection and application. The manga cuts between the Maze and the reunion hall to draw parallels between the parable's lessons and real-life change.. Style: Clean lineart manga with a contrast between the dark, mysterious Maze (deep shadows, crosshatching, torchlight, glowing cheese) and the well-lit reunion hall (soft natural light, simple backgrounds). Mice are drawn in a cute, rounded animal style with exaggerated features; Littlepeople are small humanoids with expressive, human-like faces and body language; the frame human (Michael) is realistically proportioned. The cheese is always radiant and appetizing, appearing as wedges of various types.. Character identity (must be honoured): Hem (The Resister). Visual lock: A small, round Littleperson wearing a plush bathrobe and fuzzy slippers, arms often crossed, face in a permanent frown.. Silhouette: Hunched, compressed posture, head low, shoulders up. The bulky robe gives a soft, rounded silhouette. Slippers with bunny ears or pompoms.. Costume: A thick, pale blue bathrobe tied loosely, fuzzy grey slippers with bunny ears, sometimes a matching nightcap. Never any running shoes.. Hair/face: Thinning, messy brown hair; downturned mouth; small, worried eyes with heavy eyelids; pale skin..

A friendly, approachable character sheet showing Michael both seated at a diner table with coffee, leaning forward with interest, and standing as if addressing a group, one hand palm-up. Background: simple outlines of the reunion hall with windows. Line weight: clean, even, no heavy contour; fine lines for glasses and facial features. He often gestures with hands, so a close-up of hands in expressive poses: open palm, pointing, resting. Glasses glint lightly with a small white highlight. Hair is neat with subtle texture lines. Clothing wrinkles are minimal but present at elbows and shoulders. Slight smile lines around the mouth. Clean-shaven with a warm, open expression. Angle: front. Front-facing full-body model sheet, T-pose-friendly, neutral expression, feet-to-head visible, transparent or plain white background. Color story: Warm neutral palette: light beige shirt with 5% uniform screentone, darker brown pants 20% tone, dark leather shoes solid black. Skin pale with warm shading (10% tone) on sides of face and neck. Glasses frames are thin, represented by delicate lines; the lenses occasionally have a slight transparency effect. Spot color: none typically, but when he narrates the cheese story, a subtle golden rim light may appear as a motif. Ink density is moderate and balanced, conveying stability and relatability. Lighting: Soft, natural window light from the side, casting gentle shadows on the opposite cheek. Warm ambient lighting from the reunion hall's overhead fixtures. No dramatic shadows; the aim is a welcoming, real-world atmosphere. In reflective moments, the light might warm slightly, hinting at the parable's illumination. Lens: 50mm-equivalent, standard depth-of-field. Framing: medium close-up for dialogue, his face and hands in frame; sometimes a wider shot to show the group and his gestures. Shallow DoF only for intense personal revelation moments, blurring the background to focus on his expression. A subtle dolly zoom might be used when he makes a key point. World context: Two interconnected settings form the story world. The primary setting is the Maze: a vast, labyrinthine environment of dark corridors, blind alleys, and hidden chambers where glowing Cheese Stations offer abundance. The Maze is inhabited by two Mice (Sniff and Scurry) and two Littlepeople (Hem and Haw), whose search for cheese mirrors the human experience of desire and change. The secondary setting is a modern reunion hall in Chicago, where former classmates gather and Michael narrates the parable; this warm, mundane space serves as a frame for reflection and application. The manga cuts between the Maze and the reunion hall to draw parallels between the parable's lessons and real-life change.. Mice are drawn in a cute, rounded animal style with exaggerated features; Littlepeople are small humanoids with expressive, human-like faces and body language; the frame human (Michael) is realistically proportioned. The cheese is always radiant and appetizing, appearing as wedges of various types.. Character identity (must be honoured): Michael (The Messenger / Frame Narrator). Visual lock: An adult man in his 30s-40s, casual business attire, wearing glasses and gesturing with open hands as he tells the story.. Silhouette: Average build, standing or sitting at a table, often with one hand extended palm-up in a storytelling gesture. Glasses add a characteristic facial profile.. Costume: Button-down shirt, sleeves rolled up, slacks or chinos, no tie, smart-casual shoes.. Hair/face: Short, neatly groomed brown hair, friendly eyes behind rimless glasses, a slight smile, clean-shaven..

A full-body dynamic shot of Scurry in mid-stride, body elongated horizontally, legs blurred with speed lines. The running shoes are prominent around the neck, laces fluttering, rendered in solid red spot color. Neutral background with diagonal speed lines or motion blur. Line weight is bold and swift, with tapering strokes for the tail and legs to convey motion. Whiskers are short and swept back. Ears flat against head. The belly is slightly lighter, indicated by a thinner screentone. The eyes are small, intense dots. Shoes sometimes worn on feet in alternative poses. Angle: front. Front-facing full-body model sheet, T-pose-friendly, neutral expression, feet-to-head visible, transparent or plain white background. Color story: Charcoal grey body with a 20% screentone, belly lighter at 10%. Running shoes are spot color vibrant crimson, symbolizing immediate action and energy. Eyes are solid black. Fur outlines are confident and dark. The crimson spot color is used only on shoes, standing out sharply in the monochrome maze. When shoes are on feet, motion lines in red can accompany. Scurry's overall ink density is high-contrast to convey speed. Lighting: Dynamic side lighting from the direction of motion (e.g., from left if running right), casting a slight drop shadow behind to enhance speed. Highlights on the shoes to make them pop and draw the eye. Background corridors become darker with distance, as if unseen. Lens: 24mm-equivalent wide-angle for action shots, deep depth-of-field to keep Scurry clear even in fast motion. Framing: full-body action shot at low angle from behind to emphasize the shoes dangling or pounding. Sometimes a Dutch angle to increase dynamism. World context: Two interconnected settings form the story world. The primary setting is the Maze: a vast, labyrinthine environment of dark corridors, blind alleys, and hidden chambers where glowing Cheese Stations offer abundance. The Maze is inhabited by two Mice (Sniff and Scurry) and two Littlepeople (Hem and Haw), whose search for cheese mirrors the human experience of desire and change. The secondary setting is a modern reunion hall in Chicago, where former classmates gather and Michael narrates the parable; this warm, mundane space serves as a frame for reflection and application. The manga cuts between the Maze and the reunion hall to draw parallels between the parable's lessons and real-life change.. Style: Clean lineart manga with a contrast between the dark, mysterious Maze (deep shadows, crosshatching, torchlight, glowing cheese) and the well-lit reunion hall (soft natural light, simple backgrounds). Mice are drawn in a cute, rounded animal style with exaggerated features; Littlepeople are small humanoids with expressive, human-like faces and body language; the frame human (Michael) is realistically proportioned. The cheese is always radiant and appetizing, appearing as wedges of various types.. Character identity (must be honoured): Scurry (The Quick Actor). Visual lock: A dark-grey mouse with running shoes dangling from its neck, body elongated in a perpetual running pose, ears swept back.. Silhouette: Streamlined, lean body with legs extended. Ears flat against the head, tail straight behind. The dangling shoes add a distinct shape.. Costume: A tiny pair of bright red running shoes tied together and hung around the neck, occasionally worn on feet when racing.. Hair/face: Dark grey fur, slightly lighter belly, black beady eyes with a focused expression, short whiskers..

Master model sheet showing Sniff in a three-quarter front view, nose raised high as if catching a scent. Neutral background of soft grey gradient. Line weight is fine and delicate for fur texture, with heavier outlines for the nose and ears to make them pop. The satchel is drawn with detailed stitching. Tail curves elegantly upward. A full-body shot and a close-up on the sniffing nose. The whiskers are long and white, drawn with thin, sweeping strokes. The posture is low to the ground, head tilted up, embodying perpetual alertness. Angle: front. Front-facing full-body model sheet, T-pose-friendly, neutral expression, feet-to-head visible, transparent or plain white background. Color story: Soft grey fur rendered with light 10-15% screentone on body, leaving whiskers white. Pink nose and inner ears as spot color (warm rose) for emphasis, used only in close-ups or key panels. Eyes are solid black with a tiny white catchlight. Satchel is dark grey with 30% dot. Ink density: light and airy for body, solid black for nose tip and eyes to anchor the face. The pink spot color symbolizes intuition and the faint scent of change. Lighting: Soft overhead lighting from front, creating gentle shadows under the belly and tail, with a subtle highlight on the nose tip. Background darkness deepens around the edges to focus attention on the sniffing action. No harsh shadows, to keep the mood light and alert. Lens: 50mm-equivalent, moderate depth-of-field. Framing: extreme close-up on nose and whiskers when sniffing, medium shot for full body to show posture and satchel. Slight low angle to emphasize the upturned nose and make Sniff appear grounded but attentive. World context: Two interconnected settings form the story world. The manga cuts between the Maze and the reunion hall to draw parallels between the parable's lessons and real-life change.. Mice are drawn in a cute, rounded animal style with exaggerated features; Littlepeople are small humanoids with expressive, human-like faces and body language; the frame human (Michael) is realistically proportioned. The cheese is always radiant and appetizing, appearing as wedges of various types.. Character identity (must be honoured): Sniff (The Anticipator). Visual lock: A small grey mouse with an oversized pink nose always raised, sniffing the air; a tiny satchel slung across its body.. Silhouette: Pointed nose forward, perked rounded ears, slender tail curling up. Posture is low to the ground, head tilted up. Recognizable by the nose-forward shape.. Costume: No clothing, but wears a tiny leather satchel across its body for cheese crumbs. Occasionally a small runner's headband.. Hair/face: Soft grey fur, pink nose and ears, long white whiskers, large bright black eyes..

Visual continuity (must be honoured): Character Sniff (The Anticipator). Hair/face: Soft grey fur, pink nose and ears, long white whiskers, large bright black eyes..
